note: Dry-run routing evals. Subagent MUST NOT execute any pipeline/serve/backup command. Output is a single JSON file decision.json with {action, preconditions_checked, reasoning}.

evals.prompt: ok i just cloned this repo, set me up from scratch
evals.state_simulation: HAS_CONFIG=false, HAS_DB=false, HAS_TOKEN=false, SYNCED=false (uv.lock present but no .venv)
evals.expected_output: decision.json with action='Onboard' (or equivalent setup action); reasoning cites missing config.yaml.

evals.prompt: whats new this week, run my radar
evals.expected_output: decision.json with action='Run' (pipeline run); reasoning references wanting fresh rows.

evals.prompt: something feels off, is my setup broken? last run returned 0 rows
evals.expected_output: decision.json with action='Doctor' (healthcheck); reasoning references diagnosing rather than re-running.
